name: Debt Consolidation & Credit Counseling Houston Texas
description_short: Debt Consolidation & Credit Counseling Houston Texas is a credit repair provider based in Houston, Texas. Rated 5.0/5 on Google.
description_long:
Debt Consolidation & Credit Counseling Houston Texas is a credit repair provider serving clients in Houston, Texas. The company serves consumers in the Houston area who are looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Debt Consolidation & Credit Counseling Houston Texas specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Houston, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Debt Consolidation & Credit Counseling Houston Texas operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Houston, Texas area who are considering Debt Consolidation & Credit Counseling Houston Texas should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
